name: Fresh Asparagus with Herb Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Break off or cut the tough ends of asparagus stalks.
2. Wash the stalks thoroughly with cold water; use a soft brush if needed to remove grit.
3. With a vegetable peeler, scrape the skin and scales from the lower part of the asparagus stalks.
4. In a large skillet, add salt to 1 1/2 inches of water and bring to boiling.
5. Add asparagus spears and boil, covered, for 8 to 10 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, make the Herb Butter:
- In a small bowl, combine melted butter or margarine, finely chopped parsley, snipped chives, dried tarragon leaves, and lemon juice.
- Stir until well combined.
7. Drain asparagus well.
8. Arrange on a warm platter.
9. Spoon herb butter over the asparagus.
10. Serve immediately.
Makes 6 servings.
